title: Writing after a table in an item update
excerpt: When I am writing an update on an item containing a table, it currently does not allow me to move the cursor and keep writing at the bottom after where the table is inserted. It would be nice to be able to insert more te…

posts.author: sturdybones (Cameron Lockey)
posts.cookedHtml: When I am writing an update on an item containing a table, it currently does not allow me to move the cursor and keep writing at the bottom after where the table is inserted. It would be nice to be able to insert more text after the table.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @sturdybones! Would you be able to send over a screenshot of what you’re referring to here? I’d like to test this on my end so I can look into what might be happening here! Thank you
